summary: Surah Al-Hijr affirms the divine protection of the Qur’an and recounts the fate of past disbelieving nations, including the stories of creation, the angels, Satan, and the prophets Ibrahim and Lut. It highlights the consequences of arrogance, mockery, and denial. The surah reminds believers of Allah’s mercy, creation, and the certainty of the Last Day, urging patience, worship, and trust in Allah’s wisdom.
